programme.title: The Closer: Jump the Gun

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dreading Vows

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Hog Heaven and Homestead Hell
programme.desc: The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Marty must move a cabin onto a flood-proof foundation. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs, and Misty crafts a rice patty garden in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: To save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose and secure a source of food, Marty builds a bridge across a murky creek to access more property, Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques, and Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raneys continue their rescue mission at the tire bale homestead in Central Ohio, working to provide fresh water, strengthen walls and jumpstart and indoor garden.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake Shattered
programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground while Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse and Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Poor Man's Mine
programme.desc: A third-generation miner has big dreams of re-opening his father's silver mine, but unsafe conditions call for backup. Alex and Kevin negotiate a deal to restore the mine in hopes of getting it up and running and possibly cashing in.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Under Siege
programme.desc: The Raneys attempt to help the Zabec family in Virginia. With pigs destroying the homestead, predators killing livestock and a huge oak threatening their cabin, the Raneys must convince them that their free-range dream is killing their homestead.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Poor Man's Mine
programme.desc: A third-generation miner has big dreams of re-opening his father's silver mine, but unsafe conditions call for backup. Alex and Kevin negotiate a deal to restore the mine in hopes of getting it up and running and possibly cashing in.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Life or Death in Michigan
programme.desc: The old well Marty's come to fix has already claimed a victim. To set the Dagues on a path to self-sufficiency, the Raneys try to deliver a long-term water source, protein supply, and sustainable power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake Shattered
programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground while Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse and Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programme.title: Engineering the Impossible: Egypt
programme.desc: Thousands of years after the first pyramids rose from the desert in Egypt, a team of engineers, builders and investigators attempt to resurrect these wonders of the ancient world, and uncover the secrets of their construction.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Mega City Railway
programme.desc: Uncover what it took to build one of the most ambitious rail projects in history, London's Crossrail. This staggering feat will span over 73 miles and transport 200 million people a year around one of the world's largest and busiest cities.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Halley VI Research Centre
programme.desc: The Halley VI Research Centre helps scientists to discover the wonders and dangers that lurk on the continent of Antarctica.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Largest Radio Telescope
programme.desc: Discover what it took to build the largest and most sophisticated radio telescope on the planet. This engineering colossus will help astronomers explore galaxies and planets billions of light years away, and might help discover extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Underwater Mega Tower
programme.desc: One of the most cutting-edge buildings in the world is a 16-story hotel built on the cliffs of an abandoned quarry, and using the latest science and tech, engineers race to build this innovative mega-structure with two underwater floors.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: NYC Mega Build
programme.desc: New York City's biggest construction project involves an army of ambitious engineers and builders tasked with developing seven city blocks over 24-hour subway trains in Manhattan's Hudson Yards.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Skyscrapers of the Deep
programme.desc: To build the world's biggest offshore wind farm, engineers and builders braved the deadly waters of the North Sea, and using the latest science and tech, these innovators constructed 175 towering turbines that can withstand the most hellish conditions.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: Gold Rush: When The Levee Breaks
programme.desc: Rick's season hangs in the balance when an engineering disaster shuts him down. Parker sinks a ton of money into a new claim. Tony gets a third operation running. Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rise of The Machines
programme.desc: Rick tries to outsmart a vital piece of equipment that has a mind of its own. Parker splurges on a brand new toy to get more gold. The Beets bring in a hired gun to turn around the season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Million-Dollar Pay Day, Part 1
programme.desc: Enhanced episodes of 'Gold Rush' featuring extra facts, tweets and behind-the-scenes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Red She Said
programme.desc: Kelly wants to get married in her favourite colour, red, while Beth wants to be the opposite of traditional by wearing black to her wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Budget Brides
programme.desc: Monisha has come looking for a dress for her three wedding ceremonies. Mary has a budget of thirty thousand dollars to buy two dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Til Dress Do Us Part
programme.desc: After losing 100 pounds, Stephanie wants to show off her new curves in a sexy wedding dress. Christine is looking for a traditional white gown to wear for her vow renewal ceremony. In for her fitting, Akisha is worried her dress won't impress her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: When in Doubt, Customize
programme.desc: Host Courtney Cason only wants a Mark Zunino gown, and she gets a huge surprise at Kleinfeld. Zabrina looks for an extravagant ball gown for her Near Year's Eve wedding, and Cheryl is nervous to try on her custom dress because she has never seen it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Do It With Your Boots on!
programme.desc: Randy is putting on his cowboy boots to wrangle up the next bride that will represent her state in America's wedding. Plus, Jessica wants a sleek and sexy Lazaro dress but her entourage is blushing for a ballgown.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: All 12 Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent performs a delicate surgery when she treats a toddler born with 12 toes. Dr. Schaeffer meets a nudist with funky feet, and things get tense during a foot reconstruction procedure when the patient wakes up in the middle of surgery.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a 'lady deterrent.' Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!
programme.desc: Gerard is lumpy, he has nearly a hundred lumps varying in size that coat his entire body. Gina has bloody lesions all over, and nobody has been able to help her. Eric has a large bump on his head that that he calls his "on/off button."

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Trouble with Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection. Surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: Wedding and Weigh-ins
programme.desc: Amy decides to have a real wedding ceremony because if she gets approved for surgery, she's afraid she may not survive. After the wedding, the sisters head to Atlanta hoping for a life-changing final weigh-in.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Trouble with Toes

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: Wedding and Weigh-ins

programme.desc: Game wardens attempt to catch a running deer before it hurts itself. The wardens investigate an impersonation case in which a man claims to be one of their own. While patrolling Lake Tawakoni, Richards comes across a suspicious group.

programme.desc: Deer season is well underway across Texas. In East Texas, Game Wardens find a bobcat a new home and investigate an illegally killed deer. On the coast, the Texas Game Wardens deal with an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Bucks Colllide
programme.desc: An epic backyard battle between two angry bucks results in a call to game wardens. Kiel springs into action when he responds to a call about a drowning in progress and a simple act of trespassing reveals a serious drug offense.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is served an arrest warrant, while a fisherman is caught without a license. Later, a manhunt ensues when a suspect runs a constable off the road, and a standard fishing check leads Amudson to illegal activity.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deadly Conduct
programme.desc: Inman and Eddins assist on a manhunt when a suspect runs a constable off the road. An ordinary fishing check in Navarro County leads Amundson to illegal activity. In Jasper County, game wardens patrol an area after receiving trespassing complaints.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Sharks: Outside the Cage
programme.desc: Steve Irwin ventures into the oceans around Australia to study many of the more placid and harmless sharks. Among the 'friendly' species he encounters, nothing compares to the spine chilling experience of being confronted by dozens of huge Nurse Sharks.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Gotham Feral Cats
programme.desc: Jackson visits New York City to meet a father and son who've been taking care of a feral cat colony in their backyard and are desperately in need of help. Also, Jackson lends his expertise to Mike and Darcy, who are dealing with an antisocial cat.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Lion Country
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff must perform a rare surgery to save a pup with a deadly illness. A young pregnant woman counts on Dr. Amy to help her badly injured cat. Later, Dr. Jeff and the team head to a wildlife sanctuary to treat a pride of lions.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Raining Cats, Dogs and Tigers
programme.desc: Flooding has sent Houston into a state of emergency. While the clinic takes in displaced animals, Dr. Blue treats a puppy that has contracted a deadly disease from standing water. Dr. Lavigne and Dr. Ross examine a tiger found wandering in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fuzzy Puppy Stars
programme.desc: Star-struck Snow is a Great Pyrenees puppy who dreams of following in her movie star mom's paw prints. A pair of Border Collie pups will need to be brave if they're going to be champion herders. And a Scottish Terrier tries to win over the resident cat.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: The Butt Tumble
programme.desc: We're recounting the greatest moments from all the furry-ious years of puppies at play.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Painted Dog Puppy Drama

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back

programme.title: Black-ish: Stand Up, Fall Down

programme.title: Black-ish: Wilds of Valley Glen

programme.title: Black-ish: Waltz in A Minor

programme.title: Dateline: Dreams and Nightmares: The Meek Mill Story

programme.title: Dateline: The Motive

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in a Small Town
programme.desc: Her life ended in mystery on a dead-end road. A mother of three, she was beloved by her family and tight-knit community. For years the murder investigation went cold, however secrets have a way of eventually coming out.

programme.title: In Defense Of: Ted Bundy
programme.desc: Sought out by serial killer, Ted Bundy, in the 1970s, Criminal Defense Attorney, John Henry Browne delves into his personal and professional journey to defend one of the most notorious killers in history.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez Uncovered
programme.desc: A detailed look at Aaron Hernandez's life, a millionaire athlete with a fiancé and baby, shockingly convicted of murder.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez Uncovered
programme.desc: Aaron's fiancée and close friends discuss the struggle to accept Aaron's new reality behind bars. Through the murder trial of Odin Lloyd, sisters are torn apart and a conviction seals Aaron's fate. Finally Aaron's darkest secret is revealed.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Ted Bundy
programme.desc: In the 70’s, Ted Bundy brutally murdered at least 36 young women. Glamorized as a handsome, well-educated killer who outsmarted the law, was Bundy really an evil genius… or a con artist posing as privileged to hide the monster in plain sight.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Plot Twist
programme.desc: For a group of stage actors, life seemed to be imitating art in the worst way when a young college student was killed. Police believed they knew who was responsible, but this mystery had a grand finale no one saw coming.

programme.title: Movie: Straight Outta Compton
programme.desc: The backstory of N.W.A. and its members, who came together and began putting to music their harsh experiences and anger about life growing up in the most dangerous place in America.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Money Caper

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pranksta Rap

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fabulous Faker Boy

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Phantom Island
programme.desc: When an island off the coast of Mexico suddenly disappears, government officials scramble to find an explanation; cutting-edge technology might reveal if the strange place was destroyed by a foreign power or if it existed at all.

programme.desc: Time travel might be more possible than we ever imagined, and today, cutting-edge technology and the latest research into black holes and wormholes is helping experts get steps closer to discovering how to travel through time.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf

programme.desc: Detectives respond to a cemetery caretaker's complaint of several grave robberies.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Beasts
programme.desc: Lt. Peter Guidry is dispatched to a property full of man-made booby traps, including trip wires and bear traps, and a tied-up gator acting as the property's guard dog.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: A Real Drag
programme.desc: After a violent boating accident, multiple agencies work to recover a boat, and possibly a body, from the murky depths of the Mississippi waters.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Biker Thieves
programme.desc: An organized ring of motorcycle thieves has been striking every six months, stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of motorcycles in a single night.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Full Moon Madness
programme.desc: Detectives try to track down a gang of thieves that are preying on empty camps in the deep bayou.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: The Informant
programme.desc: An inmate risks his life and turns informant to help Sergeant Hampton and Special Agent John Fisher eliminate the inmates' outside drug source.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Extortion
programme.desc: The Squad believes that prison gang members are running an extortion game when an inmate's family receives violent threats.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Desert Drifter
programme.desc: Three teenage boys looking for adventure in the peaceful and secluded high desert of California's Indian Creek run into a drifter with a mission to kill.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: When recent high school graduate Stephanie Neiman gives her friend Summer Hair a ride in small town Oklahoma, what starts out as a favor quickly becomes a struggle to survive.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Strange Passenger
programme.desc: In May 2000, friends Liz Reiser and Brandi Hicks go to a video store in the quaint Ohio town of New Philadelphia. Their plans for an innocent movie night morph into a true-life horror film when they give a ride to a stranger in the parking lot.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: Reeling from a recent breakup, 23 year-old Jacey McWilliams is down in the dumps until she finds herself smitten with a hot, new man. But just when it looks like they're about to take their relationship to the next level, it runs horrifically off course.

programme.title: Killer Comes to Town
programme.desc: The hunt for a 30-year-old woman missing for three months end when she is found murdered.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Killing Field
programme.desc: In February, a teenage couple mysteriously disappears leaving two families devastated. When their car turns up abandoned and burnt in a field, everyone's desperate for answers. But winter's thaw reveals the hideous truth that shocks the community.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Frenzy
programme.desc: Billy Shuler is dead. Now, video and audio capture the detective’s desperate hunt for his killer. As the case slowly unravels, someone comes forward and identifies Billy's murderer. When the US Marshals get involved, the killer is brought to justice.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Killing Field
programme.desc: In February, a teenage couple mysteriously disappears leaving two families devastated. When their car turns up abandoned and burnt in a field, everyone's desperate for answers. But winter's thaw reveals the hideous truth that shocks the community.

programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Frenzy
programme.desc: Billy Shuler is dead. Now, video and audio capture the detective’s desperate hunt for his killer. As the case slowly unravels, someone comes forward and identifies Billy's murderer. When the US Marshals get involved, the killer is brought to justice.

programme.title: Killer Comes to Town
programme.desc: The hunt for a 30-year-old woman missing for three months end when she is found murdered.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murder on the Reservation
programme.desc: On the northern Cheyenne Indian reservation, a young mother goes missing after the Fourth of July. When her body is discovered in the woods, the victim's family dig through the memories of their loved one to provide investigators with critical clues.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Night on the Parkway
programme.desc: In the great smoky mountains of North Carolina, Billy Carter raises his daughters Crystal and Misty. When a body is found on the scenic Blue Ridge Parkway, this family's piece of paradise becomes a nightmare they relive again and again.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: With a new home and loving fiancé, single mom Lisa Filiaggi finally feels like luck is on her side. That is until troubles from her past come back to haunt her and threaten to destroy all her future plans.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Murder House
programme.desc: Westfield, New Jersey, an affluent suburb just outside the bustle of New York City, is home to picture-perfect homes and families alike. In 1971, in the grand home of John List and his family, a true monster hides behind the stately façade.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Midlife Crisis
programme.desc: After a string of bad dates, Texas social worker Deborah Houchin believes she's finally found the man of her dreams. But not long after talk turns to marriage, Deborah disappears. It will take the help of her coworkers to find out what happened.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last One to See Them
programme.desc: An investigation of Felix Vail, the man accused of murdering his first wife, Mary Vail, in 1962; and the other women in his life, Sharon Hensely and Annette Craver, are gone without a trace. Next month, after 50 years, Felix will stand trial for murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Her Last Chance
programme.desc: After two trials, Kimberly Long was convicted of brutally murdering her boyfriend, Ozzy Conde, has spent seven years in prison, and, with the help of The California Innocence Project, she now has a new shot at justice.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Family Plot
programme.desc: Members of a Midwestern suburban family begin mysteriously dying off after weeks of flu-like symptoms. But after a third family member is hospitalized, authorities begin to believe something far more sinister is at work.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: 38 Witnesses
programme.desc: Kew Gardens, Queens, 1964: Kitty Genovese is raped and stabbed to death outside her apartment building as her neighbors watch and do nothing, introducing America to the 'bystander effect.' But is this really the whole story...?

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: The Newlydeads
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA, 1968: Cheryl Perveler is found in her yellow sports car bleeding out from a gunshot wound to the head. When investigators dig into Cheryl's life, the plot that they uncover will defy even the most outlandish expectations.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Guess Who?
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA, 1922: When a husband is found dead and his wife discovered locked in a closet, detectives find themselves lost in a world of seduction and obsession where the ghosts are all too real.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Luck Be a Lady
programme.desc: Kansas City, MO, 1960: When Patricia Jones' bullet-ridden body turns up by the side of lovers' lane, Detective Browning forges ahead on a catch me if you can trail from Missouri to Mexico, taunted by the sly smiles of his provocative arch nemesis.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Founding Fathers: Masters of Deceit
programme.desc: Discover which of America's founding fathers was a master of deceit, which one used sex as an instrument of diplomacy, which one secretly scoffed at the divinity of Jesus, and which one engaged in the greatest cover-up in all of American history.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Mary's Rectory
programme.desc: The team finds cast-iron mantles, a built-in cabinet, and a stained glass front doorway.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Firehouse Number 7
programme.desc: Firefighters ask the Dawgs to salvage what they can from their old fire house, and the team works with them to incorporate the materials into a new facility. Then, the guys heads to Highpoint, NC, to fill up their trucks with international treasures.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Last Trip to Cap Center
programme.desc: The Dawgs focus their attention on the exterior finishes of the Boulevard at the Capital Centre to complete their last round of salvaging in Largo, MD. Later, the team transforms a box of old farm equipment into a one-of-a-kind build.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Mt. Vernon Greek Revival
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs save as much as they can from a burnt-down house in Mt. Vernon, OH. In the shop, Mike builds a chair from a shopping cart.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Storefront
programme.desc: The crew take a stab at a refurbished storefront in historic downtown Lexington, Virginia. This second-generation salvage requires a lot of finesse, as the building is being renovated rather than destroyed. Windowpanes become a room divider.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Andrews Church Spires
programme.desc: The Dawgs help save copper elements from the St. Andrews Catholic Church spires in Roanoke, VA. The guys also bring in an expert to learn more about a large lithograph from a previous salvage.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Tobacco Plant
programme.desc: Robert takes the team to tobacco country where they tackle a cigarette factory, without an elevator, on the hottest day of the year. With the Dawg Bowl opening just around the corner, Mike and Tay shift their focus to a lovable piece for the venue.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Barnesville
programme.desc: The crew pick through a barn and take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio, looking for some bonus finds. Mike Whiteside meets with a return client who has an idea for a dining table set made from canning baskets and live edge wood.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Parkville Farmhouse
programme.desc: The team heads to Parkville, MD, to salvage a classic farmhouse. They remove steel from the front porch, doors, and windows from the outside while inside they work to remove radiators, banisters and wainscotting.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: North Carolina Pick and Haul
programme.desc: The gang travel to North Carolina in hopes of salvaging a Mediterranean-style mansion in Charlotte and an iconic sign in Raleigh. Though many of the items have been set aside, loading stone tubs and three-tier chandeliers presents its own challenges.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Fire Station #1
programme.desc: Robert takes the Dawgs downtown to salvage a historic firehouse that is being transformed into a restaurant and brewery. Later, Mike and Tay visit an antique shop in hopes of picking up some parts for a commission build.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cascades Inn
programme.desc: The Dawgs take on a salvage in Bath County, Virginia, at the Cascades Inn, and the historic property provides many reclaimable items. Back at the shop, Mike works with the crew to give modern functionality to a customer's family heirloom.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Sight Unseen: Guest Apartment
programme.desc: Two bedrooms and a bathroom originally used to house servants are converted into a cozy guest apartment where visiting family and band members can relax and spend the weekend.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters' Industrial Surprise
programme.desc: Donna and Toni are contacted by an old friend who is looking for a house to buy. Their surprise buyer requests a sleek industrial look, just the opposite of what they expected. Even so, the sisters deliver a house that far exceeds his expectations.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Cook's Kitchen vs. Atomic Ranch
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina create a large, spacious home with wood elements. They add special features in the kitchen like a cutting board wall and double lazy Susans, making this kitchen a cook's dream.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Sideways Silo
programme.desc: Paige and Raf start with an abandoned grain silo and turn it on its side for the basis of their indoor-outdoor living space. Paige then finds a small structure at an auction to complete their unique sideways design.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Modern Style vs. Casey and Catrina's Family Tree House
programme.desc: Paige and Raf share a house they bought at auction with Casey and Catrina, who have a specific buyer in mind. They put the house in the trees on their buyer's plot of land, while Paige and Raf create one modern home.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Traditional Residence
programme.desc: The Snow sisters battle a tough auction to win a three-bed, one-bath home. At another auction, Randy wins a small garage-like structure, but has to give up on his plan to turn it into a guesthouse after he injures his leg.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game On
programme.desc: The three build teams kick off their builds in remote Alaskan settings. Bruce Chambers and his crew begin a cabin on LaTouche Island. Mark Sams and his crew begin a cabin in Freshwater Bay. Dave Poppert and his family begin a compound on Point MacKenzie.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Wrong Stuff
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build site on LaTouche Island, their worst nightmare becomes a reality when their backup generator dies. On Mark Sams' build in Freshwater Bay, near Hoonah, one of his crew is missing, and Mark hopes for the best.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Emergency Supply Run
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, the team comes dangerously close to catastrophe as they install a 1,000 pound ridge beam. At Mark Sam's build, the team runs out of critical supplies.

programme.title: Building Alaska: End Game
programme.desc: At Point MacKenzie, Dave Poppert fights the cold and snow to finish his home in time for Thanksgiving dinner. Bruce Chambers lucks out when a friend comes to help put the finishing touches his Latouche Island cabin.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Atlanta
programme.desc: We're headed to Atlanta, one of the largest cities in the South, for some of the best things we ever ate. From barbecued rib tips and top-secret burgers, to 'angry' mussels that will make your day.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England
programme.desc: We're in New England, the birthplace of the American Revolution, for some of our favourite food. We sample Boston cream pie, sticky buns, and Szechuan sliced fish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas
programme.desc: Discover some of the hottest spots in Dallas, Texas, from brisket to fried chicken.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago

programme.title: Movie: Juice
programme.desc: Four Harlem teens are out skipping school one day when they find out an old friend was killed in a shootout at a bar. After the horrific incident, Bishop tells his friends that they have no respect, no juice. To appear 'street,' they rob a corner store.

programme.title: Movie: Over the Moon in Love
programme.desc: With her match-making business on the verge of closing, Brooklyn finds herself in the unique position to be featured in a magazine. But first, she has to set up the writer with her childhood friend Devin.

programme.title: Movie: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: A young celebrity marriage counselor is left at the altar of her own publicized wedding. To save face, she accepts an offer from her contractor, who steps in as a groom and marries her.

programme.title: Movie: Love to the Rescue
programme.desc: An animator learns her daughter has found the love of her life, in a dog. She learns that she has some competition for this new pooch in the form of the PTA President at the school who has promised his son that they will adopt the same dog.

programme.title: Movie: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: A handsome bachelor sees his life change before his eyes when he adopts a stray cat.

programme.title: Movie: All Things Valentine
programme.desc: A blogger with a string of disappointing Valentine's Days is ready to give up on love when she meets Brenden, a handsome veterinarian. She finds out he blames his recent break-up on her blog and he is the one leaving her angry comments.

programme.title: Movie: Falling for Vermont
programme.desc: When a best-selling author decides to escape the media, her plan goes awry when she's caught in a thunderstorm and crashes her car. She wakes up with no memory of who she is.

programme.title: Movie: Love on a Limb
programme.desc: A woman takes it up herself to try and save a beloved oak tree after the mayor hires a handsome landscaper to cut it down. She chains herself to it and as the landscaper attempts to wait her out, the tree brings them more than they could have imagined.

programme.title: Movie: Falling for You
programme.desc: A local radio host is hosting a bachelor bake-off to raise money to save the station. She immediately finds chemistry with one of the bachelors and they find it challenging to work together as their attraction grows.

programme.title: Movie: Love, of Course
programme.desc: A widowed mother moves her daughter to an out-of-state college dorm and is forced to take the next step in her life. While at the university, she meets a professor and discovers herself on a new path, to love.

programme.title: Movie: My Favorite Wedding
programme.desc: The maid of honour is stood up by her boyfriend and befriends the groom's best man. She then has to decide to go back to her old life or pursue a new one.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Rainbow
programme.desc: A woman has dreamt her whole life about finding her true love and starting a family. Now, she's a teacher who is still on her quest for love. When a new architect moves to town, romance is in the air for both of them.

programme.title: Movie: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A man and woman are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: Movie: Very, Very, Valentine
programme.desc: A kind hearted and shy florist meets the perfect man at a Valentine's Masquerade Ball. She enlists the help of her best friend to track him down, only to find that her perfect man may already be in front of her.

programme.title: Futurama
programme.desc: Fry, a pizza delivery boy, is frozen in 1999 and awakens 1,000 years later, on December 31st 2999.

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons
programme.desc: The boys are transformed into Japanese Warriors after they trick a vendor and buy martial arts weapons at a local flea market.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: A deeper look into the circumstances surrounding the Chris Watts murder case.

programme.title: Movie: Blue-eyed Butcher
programme.desc: A beautiful young wife and mother violently kills her husband in their Houston home after years of alleged abuse.

programme.title: Movie: Love You to Death
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead, authorities worry her disabled daughter has been kidnapped by the killer. However, when the daughter is later found unharmed, a terrible secret emerges.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Body in he Bathtub
programme.desc: Fresno mattress factory manager James Blanco worked to provide the American Dream for his employees, but when he's gunned down in the shower investigators must find out if he was betrayed by a disgruntled worker.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Overtime Kill
programme.desc: Catherine Marlow's ambition to travel the world meant working the occasional weekend, but her dedication is her downfall when she's killed in the office on her day off.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Million-Dollar Pay Day, Part 2
programme.desc: Enhanced episodes of 'Gold Rush' featuring extra facts, tweets and behind-the-scenes.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Nuggets or Bust
programme.desc: Rick brings in a secret weapon in his hunt for nuggets. Tony has a catastrophic issue. Parker bets on a new greenhorn. Dustin's chance discovery opens the door to new gold. Fred faces a life-and-death situation on new ground at Thunder Falls.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Cornered
programme.desc: After pulling the plug on his operation, Rick is thrown a lifeline that will determine the rest of his mining season. Parker and Tony battle frozen paydirt.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker tries to meet his mining goal by moving his Big Red washplant. Rick runs his washplant at maximum speed, which yields surprising results. With just one operation, Tony's entire season is threatened.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker Doubles Down
programme.desc: Parker makes a big move to double his output to bring in more gold. The Beets face a catastrophe when their remaining operation grinds to a halt. Fred fires his dredge back up and lands his biggest gold haul yet. Dustin faces an uncertain future.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Going Under
programme.desc: For the Rookies, there's tension as a new partner leads them on a wild goose chase underground. The Cooke Brothers' season is off to a bad start and Col's Crew is called on an emergency repair, wrestling a one tonne tyre change.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker Doubles Down
programme.desc: Parker makes a big move to double his output to bring in more gold. The Beets face a catastrophe when their remaining operation grinds to a halt. Fred fires his dredge back up and lands his biggest gold haul yet. Dustin faces an uncertain future.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Going Under
programme.desc: For the Rookies, there's tension as a new partner leads them on a wild goose chase underground. The Cooke Brothers' season is off to a bad start and Col's Crew is called on an emergency repair, wrestling a one tonne tyre change.

programme.title: Argo: Inside Story
programme.desc: Examine the CIA's attempt to rescue six Americans during the 1978 Iran hostage crisis.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Angels or Demons?
programme.desc: Josh Gates shines a light on places darkened by the past, from a mysterious mansion connected to a haunted heiress in California to a colorful festival commemorating the death of a demoness in India.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: St. Lawrence Team Challenge for Huge Smallmouth Bass: Hogansburg, NY, Part 2
programme.desc: David Dudley and John Cox challenge Scott and Brian Latimer to a hardcore Bass Challenge.

programme.title: The Experience: Dakota Eldridge – Steer Wrestler Charlie Warren – Hero PART 1
programme.desc: Weston and Jodi join steel wrestler Dakota Eldridge to honour Seargent Charlie Warren of his heroic acts of courage after being shot down in the first Black Hawk Helicopter in Mogadishu, Somalia.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fire of the Gods
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores places where destruction and creation exist in breathtaking concert, from the legendary Chernobyl nuclear power plant in Ukraine to a Spanish festival that culminates with a citywide inferno.

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Candy Corn
programme.desc: Blair fishes in South Padre Island in cold winter conditions for trout and redfish with Capt. Mark Nichols.

programme.title: The Next Bite: Casting Deep Water with Hair Jigs for Big, Spring Great Lakes Walleye
programme.desc: Post-spawn, trophy walleye are targeted on Green Bay of Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: Blue Ridge Rainbows
programme.desc: The ODC Crew head to a town for a fly fishing dream trip.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Electric Offshore
programme.desc: Justin learns new techniques and learns to appreciate electric reels and a fast boat.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: America's favourite Grizzlies welcome a Highland Games strongman, an Alaska Trooper and a Southwest aircraft handler to Bear Mountain to compete for fame or humiliation, and Bart makes sure the humans aren't the only mammals who end up in the water.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Born to Run
programme.desc: Bart the Bear faces the mightiest human yet in national arm-wrestling champion Bruce. Honey Bump schools Jersey girl Christina when it comes to running anything but her mouth. MMA fighter Jesse fights for a chance at a cage match with a grizzly.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Bart's First Defeat
programme.desc: A fire captain who witnessed his best friend get attacked by a grizzly returns to face his greatest fear. A champion bull rider discovers his threshold for pain against an apex predator and a Polynesian fire dancer stuns Bart with his first ever defeat.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Nothin' But Mammals ...
programme.desc: A triathlete, a former football player, and an elite bow hunter come face to face with three of America's most powerful land predators. As the humans attempt to claim the last coveted spot in next week's finale, one sets a stunning new course record.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Superhuman Showdown
programme.desc: In the season finale, the three top champions return to Bear Mountain to compete in a supersized competition with Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank. With a few devious twists courtesy of Brandon and Casey, only one human will have what it takes to win.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back To The Wild: Making It
programme.desc: The Browns set up a small log shack for the boys, and a shower and outhouse for the girls. Appearing rusty, the boys have to prove to Rusty that they still have what it takes to make it in the bush.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back To The Wild: On the Prowl

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Parenting Guide
programme.desc: Comedians share stories about their embarrassing parents/grandparents and how they've turned the tables on their own children.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Parenting Guide
programme.desc: Comedians share stories about their embarrassing parents/grandparents and how they've turned the tables on their own children.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: It's a Chicken, Sir

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Holy Moly Mirror

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Incredibly Unsettling
programme.desc: At a health store in Chicago, Michael proves you are what you drink, and later at a Metro station, he utterly derails a commuter's sense of reality.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Framing Canon
programme.desc: While working at a frame store, Michael becomes a piece of art. Then, a woman goes haywire when Michael literally loses his head.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Serious Deja Vu
programme.desc: The trick that Michael initially thought was too goofy. The trick that took nearly a week of rehearsals and tested Michael's memory.

programme.desc: Guy tries a Venezuelan sandwich loaded with shredded beef, black beans, and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Name That Kitchen
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out some righteous spots that say a lot in the name. In Fort Collins, Colo., an NFL pro and Triple-D alum team up on gangster green chili and mile-high burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cosmopolitan Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing all kinds of cosmopolitan comfort food. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, a righteous joint puts a New England spin on corned beef and cabbage, plus a fresh take on stroganoff.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin', Chillin' and Huli Huli Chicken

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Baltimore, All the Time

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Brunch, Bologna and Burgers

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Goes Tailgatin'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far East Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the States to check out some Far-East flavours. In Seattle, a funky chicken spot puts an Asian spin on poultry. A family-run gem dishes out righteous Thai specialties on the big island of Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Everyday Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting the road and taking a detour to find some out-of-the-ordinary eats. In Chico, California, a Hawaiian-Asian fusion spot serving up righteous ramen and a fried chicken bao.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far-Flung Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading out to grab flavour from far and wide. In Santa Fe, N.M., a Southwest-Middle Eastern quick stop slingin' the shawarma and salmon souvlaki. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky joint serving up outrageous Scandinavian specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Round the World Roundup
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into a world of flavours all over the United States! In Smyrna, Georgia, a doctor-turned-chef fires up amazing Asian from righteous ramen to Korean wings. In Austin, Texas, two buddies turn out their tasty take on tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Longmont, Colorado to check out what they're doing with cauliflower and pork burgers. In Columbus, Ohio, a Chicago-style restaurant makes Italian beef and gyros. Aarti Sequeira and Jet Tila meet Guy in Los Angeles for fiery Thai.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Game Day Grub
programme.desc: The Kitchen is gearing up for Sunday's big game with Eddie Jackson. Recipes include BBQ pork slow-cooker chili, meatball parm wraps, molasses gochujang chicken wings, and a meaty cheesy slider casserole.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Good Grilling
programme.desc: Ina Garten is fired up and sharing her advice for grilling and barbecuing like a pro. To start, hot coals work their magic on her Tuscan grilled Cornish hens, and she amps up the flavor on foolproof ribs with barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: TV Dinner
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts her friends for an evening of cozy television-viewing, and she makes a hearty menu of small bites that are easy to eat in front of the TV. Giada provides blankets, pillows and an individual TV tray for each guest.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Mandy Moves To The 615
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's good friend, Mandy, has finally made her home in Nashville. Mandy wants to throw a party in her new backyard and invite all her friends and neighbors. Recipes include chicken wings and chorizo quesadillas.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Make Your Own Takeout
programme.desc: For fans of Indian takeout or home cooks looking for a new way to cook beef, Rachael's quick, easy beef pepper fry: Indian-spice pepper steak will become an instant favourite. The secret is a mixture of warm, earthy spices with bright vegetables.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quarterback Mom
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's quarterback teens have a big game coming up, and she's getting ahead by making their favorite food for a post-game dinner. Win or lose, they'll enjoy a fabulous meal of meatball subs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Game Food
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is dishing up great ideas for quick and easy game-day dishes. First, she knocks mashups out of the park with five-cheese Pepperoni Pizza Queso.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Big Game Buffet Builder
programme.desc: The Kitchen is making a big game day buffet that's sure to be a touchdown at any party. Geoffrey Zakarian and Sunny Anderson work together to build an 8-foot French bread pizza with two sections.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Big Game Day
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her friend, Glenda, are looking back at Trisha's best game day recipes that have scored points with party guests over the years. Nashville hot chicken meatball sliders and Philly cheesesteak pull-apart bread are sure to please.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Game Day With The Nashville Predators
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is a huge fan of the Nashville Predators, so she's invited them over to eat, hang out and laugh about the time Ryan Johansen dragged Glenda across the ice. The game-day spread includes loaded curly fry nachos, Philly cheesesteak and more.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Llama Drama
programme.desc: Move over unicorns, there's a new animal after our hearts. The nine young bakers must create llama cupcakes in a chosen flavour. Hosts and judges Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman also welcome a special guest - a real live llama!

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Without a Prayer

programme.title: Roseanne: Busted
programme.desc: Dan tries to act as peacemaker between Becky and Mark. Roseanne heads to Chicago when she learns David and Darlene are living together.

programme.title: Roseanne: Everyone Comes to Jackie's
programme.desc: Roseanne wants David to move back with them, and Dan never wants to see him again.

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Make Room for Daddy

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: When Roseanne and pregnant Jackie visit a gay bar with Nancy and her friend, Sharon, Roseanne feels pretty smug and cool - until she is overwhelmed by a surprisingly affectionate admirer.

programme.title: Roseanne: Labor Day
programme.desc: The usual symptoms - panic, pain and incredible joy - announce the imminent arrival of Jackie's child. Even though Fred is the father, Roseanne struggles to limit his participation in the process.

programme.title: Roseanne: Past Imperfect
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan have different ideas about covering one of Dan's father's missed alimony payments. Meanwhile, new parents, Fred and Jackie, still can't figure out whether they love each other or not.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lies My Father Told Me
programme.desc: Ed is lying to Dan about the mental state of his mother, but Roseanne tries to get Dan to accept that the lie was really an act of kindness.

programme.title: Roseanne: I Pray the Lord My Stove to Keep
programme.desc: When Roseanne accepts delivery of too many new stoves for her diner, young D.J., who has found religion, begins spouting words of conscience and surprises Roseanne with some serious ethical questions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Body by Jake

programme.title: Roseanne: Isn't It Romantic?
programme.desc: While Fred seeks advice on how to propose marriage to Jackie, Dan and Roseanne are rekindling their romance with inspiration from the soap opera 'One Life to Live'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Altar Egos

programme.title: Roseanne: Nine Is Enough
programme.desc: Roseanne's announcement that she is pregnant again leads to her and Dan debating kicking Becky out of the house to make room. Jackie and Fred squabble over sleeping arrangements.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two for One
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan suffer from pregnancy jitters. Meanwhile, Roseanne accidentally uncovers Darlene's dark secret - she's having an affair.

programme.title: Roseanne: Snoop Davey Dave
programme.desc: There's a snitch in the Conner household. Upset over their recent breakup, David tattles on Darlene. And, to Roseanne's horror, she finds out that Darlene is experimenting with drugs.

programme.title: Roseanne: Girl Talk
programme.desc: When Jackie spills the news that Becky and Mark are having sexual problems, Roseanne steps in to solve their dilemma. The situation snowballs when the men realize that no subject is sacred when it comes to their gossiping wives!

programme.title: Roseanne: Sleeper

programme.title: Roseanne: White Men Can't Kiss

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Road Trips
programme.desc: From a Mississippi bridge where a murderer was hanged for his crimes to Savannah's oldest operating hotel built prior to the Civil War, these terrifying roads and haunted roadside spots will make any driver want to lock the doors and roll up the windows.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: Life: Creatures of the Deep

programme.title: Life: Plants
programme.desc: Enter the world of plants as time-lapse technology makes this violent and self-seeking organism's behaviour a truly dynamic and surprisingly emotional experience.

programme.title: Life: Primates

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Fish

programme.title: Life: Birds

programme.title: Life: Insects
