programme.title: Unique Eats: Burgers
programme.desc: Come see what's between the buns at these burger joints that are taking the American classic to the next level. Whether it's with foie gras in Philly, pimento cheese in Atlanta, umami in Los Angeles or truffles in New York.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Ice Cream
programme.desc: If you like ice cream, you will be wowed by these unique treats. How about bourbon and corn flakes flavoured scoops at Humphry Slocombe? Or the sweets at Sweet Rose Creamery where everything from the cones to the chocolate chips are made from scratch.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Sandwiches
programme.desc: Jewish Deli in New York serves up their signature smoked meat; unique sandwiches.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: L.A. Decadence
programme.desc: Uncover the most unique Sweet spots in L.A.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Doughnuts
programme.desc: Discover the most unique doughnuts in the country.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Fruit
programme.desc: Fruit is almost made sinful again with decadent desserts, fruit galette or chic tart.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Barcelona
programme.desc: Andrew takes us to Barcelona, a coastal city that draws its edible inspiration directly from the mountains and sea. From tapas to crema Catalana, the foods of this Mediterranean city reflect history and culture in every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Munich
programme.desc: As the proud capital of Bavaria and beer-drinking, Munich has built a cuisine around hearty dishes meant to stick to the bones. From schnitzel and spätzle to knöedel and cake, Andrew Zimmern reveals Munich's festival of foods.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Lady Liberty Cake
programme.desc: Sugar craft specialist Eloise Durrant receives an order for a four-foot-tall cake replica of the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Purr-Fect Birthday Cake
programme.desc: Extreme cake maker Molly Robbins is designing the purr-fect surprise for her best friend and cat lover, Liz.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fierce, Festive Cakes
programme.desc: One baker is excited to create a massive shark cake to celebrate Discovery's Shark Week, and a bride and groom are floored when their gorgeous wedding cake spins.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Legendary, Adventure Cakes
programme.desc: A couple's honeymoon travels inspire an adventure-filled cake complete with dry ice, and a Texas music legend is celebrated with a unique Route 66 cake sculpted just for him.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Hanson
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers fight to the finish for the chance at having their cupcakes at a concert and after party for the band Hanson.

programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Charmed: Dance Like No One Is Watching
programme.desc: When Harry comes down with a mysterious illness, Macy, Mel and Abigael must work together to save his life, and Macy turns to Julian for help. Jordan and Maggie embark on a dangerous mission in New Orleans.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Wound That May Never Heal
programme.desc: Blake attempts to comfort Cristal while he also works to re-establish himself. Fallon decides to expand her empire. Sam’s love life continues to heat up. Colby is forced to consider lesser options for his plan. Kirby and Adam form an unlikely friendship.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Phoebe catches Monica and Chandler in a hot embrace and decides to toy with their secret.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Old Man
programme.desc: Jerry, George and Elaine assist senior citizens; Kramer and Newman help an old man.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike's Feet
programme.desc: Mike and Carl get on each other's nerves after working too many double shifts together during a snowstorm.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Duchess of Dull-in-Sack
programme.desc: Walden tries to loosen Zoey up by sharing a couple of Berta's special brownies with her.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Big Baby Ball
programme.desc: When Mr. Meller singles out Adam during a game of Dodgeball, Beverly intervenes to protect Adam and gets Meller fired. But soon, Murray and Adam see him in a new light, so Beverly tries to get his job back.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: I Lost on Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Having become obsessed with game shows since leaving college, Erica tries out for 'Jeopardy!' Meanwhile, a new crush for Barry comes to light, prompting him to realize he might not be over Lainey.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Not Regular Down There
programme.desc: Max is both puzzled and curious when the new guy she is dating expresses hesitations abut intimacy because he is 'not regular down there.' Also, Sophie and Oleg struggle to get pregnant.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Guess Who's Bizzack
programme.desc: When Blue struggles at training camp, Jason takes to the field to show him how it's done, winning praise from Malik, who tries to convince his former teammate to re-sign with the Sabers.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Where There's Smoke, There's Ire
programme.desc: Mandy takes a new interest in vaping, and while disappointing to her parents, it also sparks memories of Vanessa's old smoking habits. Later on, Mike finds out that Vanessa has been secretly smoking and must find a way to gently confront her.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Elephant Camp
programme.desc: In Zimbabwe, Jack visits Elephant Camp - a home for orphaned elephants. He assists in radio collaring a female in preparation for her release into the wild. Then, Jack walks with an orphaned cheetah.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Braving Bocas
programme.desc: Panama's Bocas del Toro archipelago features a high concentration of bats. Jack ventures into a remote cave to get up close with bats and learn about the species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Loango: Africa's Last Eden
programme.desc: Jack and his family explore the untouched wilderness of Loango National Park in Gabon, which is often called Africa's Last Eden. They encounter forest elephants, forest buffalo, and injured sea turtle and a wild beach.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Old House Discoveries
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin make some dramatic discoveries while demolishing the kitchen and baths, Roger moves a massive rhododendron and Norm checks out one of the finest surviving examples of the Italianate style: the over-the-top Victoria Mansion in Portland, ME.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Wild and Rescued
programme.desc: Aspiring zoologists learn about flying with help from hawks. Two ocean loving sisters visit a marine mammal rescue in San Pedro, California. Plus, helping abandoned bear cubs prepare for hibernation.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Girls Who Code
programme.desc: Alie shows us the former politician who is training girls to become computer coders, the women who invented a new way to keep food fresh, the fold up kayak, and the headlights for your running shoes.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Raw Travel: Going Solo: Bewitched in Bali
programme.desc: Viewers are encouraged to break out the passport and explore cultures around the world.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Kiss
programme.desc: Thirty year old Michael has the perfect girlfriend and a lucrative future, but when a gorgeous college student comes into his life the choices of adulthood begin to weigh on him heavily.

programme.title: Movie: The Rundown
programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with a mob boss's son in order to retrieve a legendary artifact.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: A woman on a flight, thinking the plane is about to crash, discloses all her secrets to a seeming stranger, then later finds out the man is actually the CEO of the company she is working for.

programme.title: Movie: Arizona
programme.desc: A single and struggling realtor mom's life goes off the rails when she witnesses a murder.

programme.desc: A comic book writer meets a woman and they enjoy a depressive relationship together.
